assumptions.bytesNote: 1200 B/event (locked single constant). The CWD exclude removes ~60 B/event (CWD record) -> ~1140 B net; the additive band uses full 1200 B as the upper bound. Standardized from 900 to 1200 B/event (locked 2026-06-03).

correct_model.comment: Cost = the additive watch only. The exclude contributes 0 additive volume and lowers net bytes.
correct_model.math: watch event 1200 B (locked constant). typical 20000*1200/1e9 = 0.024 GB/day -> 0.024*30.4*5 = $3.65/mo. The exclude REDUCES net bytes from 1200 B/event (to ~1140 B net). Standardized from 900 to 1200 B/event (locked 2026-06-03).
correct_model.note: Net <= band. The CWD exclude removes ~60 B per watch event. The exact suppression benefit is workload-dependent (f3 section 5).

without_exclude_reference.comment: the watch alone at full 1200 B/event (same as additive band at the locked constant)

naive_wrong_model.comment: A naive impl counts the exclude rule as an ADDITIVE rule with its own volume.
naive_wrong_model.error: Adding the exclude as additive DOUBLE-counts and OVERSTATES; the exclude only ever REDUCES (removes CWD bytes). The correct net is <= the watch-alone band ($3.65/mo typical); a naive additive model would report well above $3.65/mo.
